description: Calculate the Topographic Position Index (TPI) from the SRTM DEM file at '/home/ga/snap_data/srtm_dem.tif' and classify the landscape into three discrete landform categories (Ridges, Valleys, and Slopes) using ESA SNAP Desktop. Your analysis must include a 'smoothed_elevation' band derived from a spatial smoothing filter, a 'tpi' band calculated as the difference between the original and smoothed elevation, and a 'landform_class' band that uses conditional logic to define the three categories. Save the complete multi-band product in BEAM-DIMAP format to '/home/ga/snap_exports/tpi_analysis' and export the 'landform_class' band as a GeoTIFF to '/home/ga/snap_exports/landform_class.tif'.
